antiInflammatory.focus: Inflammation management through Beta-Endorphin Stimulator and anti-inflammatory actives
keyTechnologies: Beta-Endorphin Stimulator - produces sense of wellbeing and anti-inflammatory action
Bisabolol - powerful anti-inflammatory and skin soothing properties
Centella Asiatica Extract - promotes healing, anti-inflammatory, improves collagen synthesis
Blackcurrant Seed Oil - rich in omega 3 and 6 for essential anti-inflammatory action
Pro-inflammatory eicosanoid modulation to reduce inflammatory response

clinicalEvidence.approachBasis: Targeting the silent killer - inflammation as primary cause of skin aging
clinicalEvidence.activeIngredients: Clinically effective concentrations proven in relevant trials
clinicalEvidence.mechanismOfAction: Reduces pro-inflammatory response and associated cellular damage

antiOxidants.focus: Environmental protection through advanced UV filters and synergistic antioxidant combinations
keyTechnologies: Uvinul A Plus - superior UVA protection with 95% free radical reduction
Tinosorb S - photostable broad-spectrum UV protection and SPF booster
Uvinul T150 - UVB protection working synergistically with UVA filters
Beta-Endorphin Stimulator - powerful antioxidant action and skin protection
Synergistic antioxidant combinations for comprehensive free radical defense

clinicalEvidence.approachBasis: Combating free radical damage as primary cause of skin aging
clinicalEvidence.uvProtectionSystem: Advanced photostable filters for superior long-term skin protection
clinicalEvidence.mechanismOfAction: Prevents oxidation and free radical chain reactions that damage cells and DNA

rejuvenation.focus: Cellular renewal through peptide technology, alpha hydroxy acids, and advanced actives
keyTechnologies: Matrixyl 3000 - peptide complex that activates genes for extracellular matrix renewal
Power Peels 30 & 50 - alpha hydroxy acid systems for controlled exfoliation and renewal
Natural fruit acids (Lactic, Malic, Citric) - promote gradual exfoliation and cell turnover
Centelastin - elastin promoting peptide with anti-glycation and collagen synthesis support
Hypnea Musciformis Algae Extract - stimulates collagen and fibrillin network formation
Reparative elastin stimulating peptides for healthy collagen synthesis

clinicalEvidence.approachBasis: Skin restructuring for perfectly formed and healthy cell development
clinicalEvidence.peptideTechnology: Synergistic peptides restore and maintain youthful appearance
clinicalEvidence.mechanismOfAction: Activates natural repair processes and promotes healthy cell renewal
